description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with an attached microphone boom, commonly used for communication or audio playback in urban environments. The headband is rectangular and solid, colored in red, connecting two large, rounded ear cups that are half red and half gray. The ear cups are padded with thick, gray cushioning for comfort and noise isolation. A flexible, gray microphone boom extends from the left ear cup, curving forward and ending in a rounded tip. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with a focus on durability and comfort for extended use. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with foam padding for the ear cups and headband.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with a red rectangular headband, gray padded ear cups, and an attached microphone boom.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing both ear cups, the red headband, and the microphone boom extending from the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the left ear cup, the full length of the microphone boom, and the rectangular headband.
description_view_2: Front view displaying both ear cups symmetrically, the red headband, and the microphone boom positioned forward.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the right ear cup and the headband, with the microphone boom partially visible.
